message:
refactor: eliminate send-keys allocation, use tokenizeScalar, consolidate tests

- Extract sendKeyArg() and process args inline in send-keys handler,
  removing the intermediate args_list ArrayList allocation entirely
- Replace manual space-splitting while loop with std.mem.tokenizeScalar
- Remove redundant "JSON extraction for tmux API bodies" test (already
  covered by individual jsonGetString/jsonGetInt/jsonGetArray tests)
- Fold "C-a through C-z" test into main tmuxKeyLookup test
- Fix duplicate doc comment on jsonFindValue. Net -48 lines.
